{{Quote|Take your feet off the table! You complain of sand in my food - when you put your feet on my dinner table? You have the manners of dragons!|[[Grake]] when confronting [[Hethrir]]'s Proctors over quality of dinner|<ref name="The Crystal Star">''[[The Crystal Star]]''</ref>}}
'''Proctors''' was a youth movement used by the [[Empire Reborn]] between [[13 ABY/Legends|13]] to [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]]. They were mainly composed of [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] male adolescents recruited by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Procurator of Justice]] [[Hethrir]] at his base of operations on his private [[Worldcraft]].

Proctors wore blue jumpsuits covered with medals and were armed with [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. Proctors served as Hethrir's fighting force and their duties included supervising the rest of the children held captive at Hethrir's Worldcraft and escorting him anywhere he went. Those who performed remarkably were recruited into the elite [[Empire Youth]].

All members were required to undergo a purification ritual involving the creature [[Waru]] at [[Crseih Station]]. If a participant failed in his ritual and was slain by Waru, the other Proctors present were sworn to uphold the secrecy about his death.

Following the death of Hethrir during a [[Confrontation on Crseih Station|skirmish]] with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at [[Crseih Station]], the surviving Proctors were taken into custody by the New Republic.

==Behind the scenes==
Proctors may have been modeled after [[Wikipedia:Hitler Youth|Hitler Youth]]. Both organizations have been use as fighting forces by their leaders, in this case Hethrir.
